cname_setup.description: Configuration for setting up CNAME in Railway

steps.details: Log in to your Railway account and select the project you want to configure.
Go to the settings of the project and find the domain configuration section.
In the domain settings, you will have the option to add a new CNAME record. Enter the desired subdomain and the target domain.
Ensure that the CNAME record is pointing to the correct domain by using tools like DNS checker.

cname_setup.notes: Make sure your DNS provider supports CNAME records and that the changes have propagated correctly.
